title: achras elengoides
intro: Achras elengoides, also known as the sabdariffa plant or red rose mallow, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Achras elengoides include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
